Question: What is the mean intraoperative arterial anion gap (IntraopSerumAnionGap) for the combined cases of: (1) OR-2026-00049 ambulatory ENT procedure same-day — ASA 2 (mild systemic disease without substantive functional limitation), PeriopVasoactiveTier "Requirement for catecholamine rotation due to tachyphylaxis", HemostasisComplicationGrade "Bleeding necessitating targeted vessel ligation intraoperatively"; (2) OR-2026-00048 trauma laparotomy immediate — ASA 3E (severe systemic disease, emergency operative status), PeriopVasoactiveTier "Requirement for catecholamine rotation due to tachyphylaxis", HemostasisComplicationGrade "Persistent bleeding despite measures leading to angioembolization"; (3) OR-2026-00050 transplant theatre index — ASA 5E (moribund with emergency intervention required), PeriopVasoactiveTier "No vasoactive support administered in perioperative window", HemostasisComplicationGrade "No hemorrhagic event intraoperatively, hemostasis uncomplicated"; and (4) OR-2026-00046 obstetric cesarean delivery urgent — ASA 3 (severe systemic disease with measurable activity restriction), PeriopVasoactiveTier "Intermittent bolus vasopressor use only", HemostasisComplicationGrade "Bleeding requiring blood transfusion of packed red cells"?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(IntraopSerumAnionGap) AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM (SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00049 ambulatory ENT procedure same-day" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 2 — mild systemic disease without substantive functional limitation" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Requirement for catecholamine rotation due to tachyphylaxis" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Bleeding necessitating targeted vessel ligation intraoperatively" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00048 trauma laparotomy immediate" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 3E — severe systemic disease, emergency operative status" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Requirement for catecholamine rotation due to tachyphylaxis" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Persistent bleeding despite measures leading to angioembolization" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00050 transplant theatre index" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 5E — moribund with emergency intervention required" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "No vasoactive support administered in perioperative window" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "No hemorrhagic event intraoperatively, hemostasis uncomplicated" UNION ALL SELECT IntraopSerumAnionGap AS IntraopSerumAnionGap FROM PerioperativePhysiologyRegistry WHERE ProcedureEpisodeID = "OR-2026-00046 obstetric cesarean delivery urgent" AND ASAClassification = "ASA 3 — severe systemic disease with measurable activity restriction" AND PeriopVasoactiveTier = "Intermittent bolus vasopressor use only" AND HemostasisComplicationGrade = "Bleeding requiring blood transfusion of packed red cells");

Question: What is the average central venous oxygen saturation percentage (ScvO2) across these four specific records: EnrollmentNumber "ENR-2026-098 (ambulatory complex case)" with ASAStatus "ASA II E — mild systemic disease emergency" and HemodynamicPhenotype "vasoplegic phenotype refractory to low-dose vasopressors after induction"; EnrollmentNumber "ENR-2026-215 (elective cardiac referral)" with ASAStatus "ASA IV E — life-threatening emergency status" and HemodynamicPhenotype "hypovolemic phenotype with low preload, narrow pulse pressure, and high SVR"; EnrollmentNumber "ENR-2025-110 (elective orthopaedic with comorbidity)" with ASAStatus "ASA IV — severe systemic disease posing constant threat to life" and HemodynamicPhenotype "neurogenic autonomic-dysfunction phenotype with bradycardia and hypotension"; and EnrollmentNumber "ENR-2025-110 (elective orthopaedic with comorbidity)" with ASAStatus "ASA V — moribund not expected to survive without operation" and HemodynamicPhenotype "hypovolemic phenotype with low preload, narrow pulse pressure, and high SVR"?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(ScvO2) AS ScvO2 FROM (SELECT ScvO2 AS ScvO2 FROM PerioperativeHemodynamicProfile WHERE EnrollmentNumber = "ENR-2026-098 (ambulatory complex case)" AND ASAStatus = "ASA II E — mild systemic disease emergency" AND HemodynamicPhenotype = "vasoplegic phenotype refractory to low-dose vasopressors after induction" UNION ALL SELECT ScvO2 AS ScvO2 FROM PerioperativeHemodynamicProfile WHERE EnrollmentNumber = "ENR-2026-215 (elective cardiac referral)" AND ASAStatus = "ASA IV E — life-threatening emergency status" AND HemodynamicPhenotype = "hypovolemic phenotype with low preload, narrow pulse pressure, and high SVR" UNION ALL SELECT ScvO2 AS ScvO2 FROM PerioperativeHemodynamicProfile WHERE EnrollmentNumber = "ENR-2025-110 (elective orthopaedic with comorbidity)" AND ASAStatus = "ASA IV — severe systemic disease posing constant threat to life" AND HemodynamicPhenotype = "neurogenic autonomic-dysfunction phenotype with bradycardia and hypotension" UNION ALL SELECT ScvO2 AS ScvO2 FROM PerioperativeHemodynamicProfile WHERE EnrollmentNumber = "ENR-2025-110 (elective orthopaedic with comorbidity)" AND ASAStatus = "ASA V — moribund not expected to survive without operation" AND HemodynamicPhenotype = "hypovolemic phenotype with low preload, narrow pulse pressure, and high SVR");
